---
title: "Miss ?Agnes Cox"
---

## Miss ?Agnes Cox

### Biography

It is possible that CMY\'s Miss Cox is the same as the Agnes Cox who published <i>Zenza and Ounah, the Indian sisters, and other poems</i> (Windermere: Johnson 1887).  Miss Cox evidently knew the author of [[otherbook:612]\'The Cardioscope\'], an early series in <i>MP</i>, and perhaps that was written by [[person:375]Harriet Lucy Cox], who is a probable early contributor.  However, there is little substantial evidence here.

### Letters

- Letter from Aug 20th [1891-3]

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
